name: Sparrow

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
this build stacks over +100% attack speed and the sim has NO measured attack-speed cap (calibration checklist 7) — sustained-DPS numbers are optimistic until the cap is measured

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Deathstalker), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +18.5% on your headline output at minute 15.

augments.name: Endless Hunt
augments.note: takedown resets and permanent pen stacking; game-state economy

augments.name: Inner Fury
augments.note: arrow fan and extra volleys; single-target share of the spread is unstated

augments.name: Sun Shards
augments.note: ricochets hit other targets; no single-target change

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 24 — about 225 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.
Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 24 — about 400 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +27% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Deathstalker over Storm Breaker (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 394 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +13% more sustained auto DPS: try Deathstalker over Storm Breaker (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Necrosis: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Necrosis: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.
